summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, low-signal close, and post-merge close are disabled. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent maintainer-review items unless already closed or missing live artifact state.
